name: Estate
description: Professional, trustworthy theme for property management. Deep navy for stability, forest green for growth, warm gold accent. Light mode default for business applications.

decorators.estate-canvas: Warm off-white background (#FDFBF7 light, #1A1A1F dark). Clean professional foundation for data-heavy interfaces.
decorators.estate-nav: Sidebar navigation with subtle surface background. Professional icon + label layout.
decorators.estate-card: Surface background with subtle warm-tinted border, 6px radius, soft shadow on hover. Professional card styling.
decorators.estate-card-metric: Metric card with colored left border accent based on metric type. Large number, small label, optional trend indicator.
decorators.estate-input: Clean border with warm undertone, navy focus ring. Professional form styling.
decorators.estate-table: Striped rows with warm alternating background, sticky header, row hover highlight. Optimized for financial data.
decorators.estate-badge: Status badge with semantic color background. Consistent status styling across patterns.
decorators.estate-divider: Hairline separator with warm border tone (#E8E4DC light, #3A3A42 dark).
decorators.estate-fade-up: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, translateY 8px to 0, 180ms ease-out. Professional, not playful.
decorators.estate-stat: Large number display (heading2 size) with small label underneath. Optional trend indicator (up/down arrow with percentage).
decorators.estate-progress: Progress bar with semantic fill color. Used for occupancy rates, collection rates, etc.
decorators.estate-status-occupied: Green status indicator for occupied units, paid rent, resolved tickets.
decorators.estate-status-vacant: Red status indicator for vacant units, overdue payments, urgent tickets.
decorators.estate-status-pending: Amber status indicator for pending payments, upcoming due dates, open tickets.

owner-dashboard.description: Property owner dashboard with sidebar navigation. Portfolio metrics, property grid, financial summaries.

tenant-portal.description: Tenant self-service portal with top navigation. Simplified interface for payments and maintenance.

marketing.description: Marketing pages with top nav and footer. Professional SaaS landing page styling.

auth.description: Centered auth forms with professional card styling.

financial.description: Financial dashboards and reports. Data-dense with tables, charts, and metrics.

estate-canvas.description: Warm off-white background (#FDFBF7 light, #1A1A1F dark). Clean professional foundation for data-heavy interfaces.
estate-canvas.intent: Use as the root page background for property management dashboards. The warm tone conveys trust and professionalism.

estate-nav.description: Sidebar navigation with subtle surface background. Professional icon + label layout.
estate-nav.intent: Use for the primary sidebar navigation. The subtle surface background provides gentle separation from the canvas.

estate-card.description: Surface background with subtle warm-tinted border, 6px radius, soft shadow on hover. Professional card styling.
estate-card.intent: Use for content containers in dashboards and listing pages. The warm border creates a professional, trustworthy appearance.

estate-card-metric.description: Metric card with colored left border accent based on metric type. Large number, small label, optional trend indicator.
estate-card-metric.intent: Use for KPI and metric displays in dashboards. The colored left border categorizes the metric type at a glance.

estate-input.description: Clean border with warm undertone, navy focus ring. Professional form styling.
estate-input.intent: Use for all form inputs in property management interfaces. The navy focus ring maintains professionalism.

estate-table.description: Striped rows with warm alternating background, sticky header, row hover highlight. Optimized for financial data.
estate-table.intent: Use for data-dense tables like rent rolls and payment histories. Striped rows aid scanning large datasets.

estate-badge.description: Status badge with semantic color background. Consistent status styling across patterns.
estate-badge.intent: Use for status indicators throughout the application. Semantic colors ensure consistent, at-a-glance status recognition.

estate-divider.description: Hairline separator with warm border tone (#E8E4DC light, #3A3A42 dark).
estate-divider.intent: Use to separate content sections and list items cleanly. The warm tone maintains the professional aesthetic.

estate-fade-up.description: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, translateY 8px to 0, 180ms ease-out. Professional, not playful.
estate-fade-up.intent: Use as the entrance animation for dashboard content. Short distance and duration keep the motion professional.

estate-stat.description: Large number display (heading2 size) with small label underneath. Optional trend indicator (up/down arrow with percentage).
estate-stat.intent: Use for prominent metric values in dashboard headers and summary sections.

estate-progress.description: Progress bar with semantic fill color. Used for occupancy rates, collection rates, etc.
estate-progress.intent: Use for percentage-based metrics like occupancy and collection rates. Semantic fill colors communicate performance at a glance.

estate-status-occupied.description: Green status indicator for occupied units, paid rent, resolved tickets.
estate-status-occupied.intent: Use for positive status indicators. Green signifies healthy, completed, or active states.

estate-status-vacant.description: Red status indicator for vacant units, overdue payments, urgent tickets.
estate-status-vacant.intent: Use for negative or urgent status indicators. Red signals attention needed or overdue items.

estate-status-pending.description: Amber status indicator for pending payments, upcoming due dates, open tickets.
estate-status-pending.intent: Use for in-progress or upcoming status indicators. Amber signals items that need monitoring but are not yet critical.
